title: Handmade Personalised 2nd Wedding Anniversary Candle, Gift for Couples, Hand Poured Soy Wax Vegan Scented Candle, Mr & Mrs Gift, Cotton Anniversary (White Votive, Fresh Linen)
features: Hand Poured with Love in Lancashire
20cl Glass Votive comes with wooden lid
Complete with beautiful gift box & hand-tied bow
description: Our candles are hand poured in Lancashire using 100% vegan soy wax. Each candle is individually poured into a 20cl glass votive container and fitted with a single cotton wick. The candle is left to cure overnight. A white label is applied to the candle and can be personalised with the couple’s names. The candle comes complete with a gift box tied with a bow and a glass jar containing matches. The votive glass jars are available in black and white with a matt finish. Approximate burn time is up to 25 hours, depending on usage conditions. Safety Information: Never leave a burning candle unattended Do not burn a candle for longer than 4 hours at a time Keep out of reach of children and pets Leave at least 10cm between burning candles Do not place candles near flammable items Avoid placing candles in draughts Trim wick to 5mm before lighting Stop use when approximately 5mm of wax remains Extinguish the flame using a snuffer rather than blowing out Keep wax free from matches and debris
